docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LLOYD, TIM AS TO DEFENDANT UDOVCH, KEITH AS INDIVIDUAL DBA BAY CITIES MECHANICAL DBA ROSE HEATING & AIR CONDITIONING JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
